resources.string:
0.9.10
Improved category management: add-category dialogs now have a cleaner layout, better field sizing, and more consistent spacing.
Fixed add buttons on the category screen so the whole row can be tapped, not only the plus icon.
Renamed category actions to make the difference between categories and subcategories clearer.
0.9.9\nFixed several category screen glitches: list items no longer overlap while scrolling, category search is opened from the toolbar, and parent category names wrap more cleanly.
0.9.8\nFixed issues that could cause icons to change after an application update.\nAdded encrypted backup and restore for transferring data between phones.

0.9.7
Added
It is possible to select multiple currencies on first launch.
Quick search in categories.
Quick selection of currencies, categories, accounts.
Calculator when adding a payment.
0.9.6.1\nFixed a bug with the button to add a new quick payment.\nFixed a bug with a pop-up window in the log.

0.9.6
When making a payment, a pop-up window appears to quickly add the next payment.
Added a button to clear the amount when making a payment.
Only vertical orientation has been added.
Some interface bugs have been fixed.
0.9.5\nImprovements in the work of fast payments, namely, by short pressing on a fast payment, it is made immediately, by long pressing the settings dialog box appears.\nFixed some bugs.
0.9.3\nMore icons added.\nFixed display errors in some windows.
0.9.2\nIcons have been added to the category.\nAdded List Of changes message, after update the application.
0.8.8.1\nAbility to select a time period in reports.
